data.title: 99 Kids Holdings raises $5M to relaunch THE 99, a children's superhero IP, for global reach.
data.description: Popular worldwide superhero franchise makes a comeback with a new distribution approach to target more than 99 countries. Based in Vancouver, BC and Dubai, UAE, 99 Kids Holdings Co., an entertainment company operating in both Canada and UAE, revealed the completion of a $5 million Series A funding round. Lead by an undisclosed party, this funding is set to aid the company in their global reach and expansion plans.

data.title: Westlake Epoxy and Brenntag expand distribution to South and West India, reaching fast-growing markets. - 142 characters
data.description: Houston-based Westlake Corporation (NYSE: WLK) has revealed its expansion plans for its subsidiary Westlake Epoxy, extending its distribution partnership with Brenntag to cover South and West India. This move comes as a way to tap into the rapidly growing coatings, adhesives, and construction markets in the region. The new agreement builds upon the successful existing partnership between the two companies in Europe, North and South America, and Southeast Asia. This collaboration is expected to bolster Westlake Epoxy's presence in the industry. Under this expansion, Brenntag will distribute Westlake Epoxy's products in the specified regions.

data.description: In the past day, the ZORA token surged by 6.2% to reach $0.022 following Zora's introduction of its latest attention markets product.

data.title: NYC Disinfection Services launches new residential relocation division focused on workforce dev & MWBE partnerships.
data.description: Whitestone, New York - On February 17, 2026, NYC Disinfection Services, Inc. announced the official launch of a specialized residential relocation division. The company, certified as a Women-Owned Business Enterprise in both New York State and New York City, aims to assist with large-scale housing modernization and capital projects.

data.title: W. P. Carey prices public offering of 6M shares of common stock on forward sale agreements.
data.description: In New York on February 17, 2026, W. P. Carey Inc. (NYSE: WPC) revealed the details of an underwritten public offering. This offering consists of 6,000,000 shares of the Company's common stock. These shares are being offered on a forward basis as part of the forward sale agreements.
